overall.description: A first-person walk through the Saint Denis dock district in Red Dead Redemption 2 at night. The player moves from a wooden building porch along boardwalks and muddy docks, passing through an ornate archway as rain begins to fall, illuminated by warm gas lamps against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden porch of historic building

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the building exterior, observing the glass doors and wooden walls

entered.detail: wooden framed glass doors with sheer curtains visible inside
dark brown horizontal wooden siding on building exterior
ornate black iron lantern mounted on wall emitting warm light
solid wooden double doors with metal handles

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered wooden porch of a historic building at night. The camera moves slowly past glass doors with curtains and wooden walls illuminated by warm wall-mounted lanterns. The space is narrow and enclosed, with no sky visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden boardwalk along waterfront buildings

events.description: exits the covered porch area onto the open boardwalk revealing the dock district ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk with the building wall on the right and open dock area visible to the left

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with railings
tall black iron street lamp with multiple glowing lanterns

segments.scene_description: Moving from the enclosed porch onto an elevated wooden boardwalk, the scene opens to reveal the waterfront dock district ahead. The building wall remains on the right while street lamps line the left side, illuminating the wooden planks underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock plaza with shipping crates and mud ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the open dock area surrounded by wooden crates and street lamps

entered.detail: stacked wooden shipping crates scattered around the dock area
muddy dirt ground with patches of dry grass replacing the wooden boardwalk
weathered wooden fence lining the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from wooden planks to muddy dirt as the camera moves through a wide open dock plaza. Wooden shipping crates are scattered around the area, and street lamps provide the only illumination against the dark night sky. The space feels expansive and empty.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with ornate entry archway in heavy rain

events.description: rain begins falling heavily, creating visible streaks and wet surfaces
passing under the large ornate Saint Denis archway onto the wooden pier

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the Saint Denis archway while rain begins to fall, continuing onto the wooden pier

entered.detail: large ornate wooden archway with decorative trim and signage reading SAINT DENIS
wet wooden plank pier extending over water, reflecting the lamp light

segments.scene_description: As rain begins to fall, the camera approaches the ornate Saint Denis archway marking the entrance to the pier. Passing under the decorative wooden structure, the ground transitions back to wooden planks glistening with rain. Street lamps cast a warm glow through the downpour as the camera continues onto the open pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed porch into an expansive, rain-slicked dock district at night. It begins by gliding past the glass doors and wooden walls of a historic building, illuminated by the warm glow of wall-mounted lanterns. As the camera moves from the porch onto an elevated wooden boardwalk, the scene opens up to reveal the waterfront, with street lamps lining the path ahead. The ground then transitions from wooden planks to muddy dirt as the camera traverses an open plaza scattered with shipping crates under a dark sky. Finally, as rain begins to fall, the camera passes under an ornate decorative archway and onto the glistening wooden planks of the open pier.
